scripts.deploy: vite build && cd /tmp && rm -rf atlas-deploy && mkdir atlas-deploy && cd atlas-deploy && git init && git checkout --orphan gh-pages && cp -r /Users/thomaspasson/Development/sw-milestone-plan/dist/. . && git add -A && git commit -m 'Deploy: update build' && git remote add origin git@github.com:tpasson/sw-milestone-plan.git && git push origin gh-pages --force
